objective: Build a governed combined feature registry by joining V3.67 market, V3.68 industry, and V3.69 macro feature panels on signal_use_date; do not create labels, portfolio outputs, or model promotion evidence.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not create return labels or IC evidence.
Do not use current component snapshots or latest weights.
Do not claim official total-return evidence.
Do not promote any feature into the default model.
acceptance_criteria: All three source manifests must pass their own self checks.
All three source panels must contain trade_date, signal_use_date, and history_sufficient.
The combined panel must have at least 6000 rows and at least 6000 full-source rows.
The combined panel must have at least 4500 validation-ready rows.
The feature registry must register at least 150 source features with source version and family metadata.
No output CSV column contains forbidden performance or promotion terms.
failure_conditions: Any output allows portfolio harness or model promotion.
Any label, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return output is produced.
Any source row is joined on a future signal date or mismatched source row count.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: backtest_validation_auditor should design V3.71 guarded feature-label validation using this registry and an explicitly permitted label source.
